0.q: In H. werneckii, the presence of the HOG pathway was demonstrated by identification of homologous genes of the main components of the pathway: the MAPK HwHog1, the MAPKK HwPbs2 and a putative histidine kinase osmosensor HwHhk7.

1.q: the osmotolerance was restored only in the presence of the MAPKK Pbs2... the signal triggered by increased osmolarity transfers to Hog1 via the upstream MAPKK Pbs2.

2.q: In H. werneckii, the presence of the HOG pathway was demonstrated by identification of homologous genes of the main components of the pathway: the MAPK HwHog1, the MAPKK HwPbs2 and a putative histidine kinase osmosensor HwHhk7.
